name: forgelink
description: A private communications console for direct links, messages, and trusted channels
author: Jeremy Shows

scripts.dev: npm run backend:build && npm run renderer:build && electron .
scripts.build: npm run backend:build && npm run renderer:build && electron-builder -c builder.json
scripts.test: npm run backend:build && npm run renderer:build && vitest run renderer/src/App.test.tsx && node --test attention.test.js onboarding.test.js tunnel.test.js lifecycle.test.js security.test.js packaging.test.js live-twilio.test.js backend-dist/database.test.js backend-dist/migration.test.js backend-dist/server.test.js backend-dist/signals.test.js backend-dist/twilio.test.js && node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check onboarding.js && node --check attention.js && node --check tunnel.js && node --check lifecycle.js && node --check security.js
scripts.screenshot: npm run backend:build && npm run renderer:build && electron scripts/visual-smoke.js
